_note: Changed: add a Cycle 7 training manifest skeleton. Why: future training runs can converge on one explicit manifest without changing training scripts; this file is not executable until null values are resolved.

dataset._note: Changed: reserve dataset inputs and split metadata. Why: training data selection should be explicit and auditable.

prompt_schema._note: Changed: reserve prompt rendering schema fields. Why: prompt construction should be separable from model and optimizer settings.

model._note: Changed: reserve base model identity and loading settings. Why: model choice should be explicit before any run consumes this manifest.

adapter._note: Changed: reserve adapter training settings. Why: adapter configuration should be declared independently from the base model.

optimization._note: Changed: reserve optimizer and scheduler settings. Why: optimization behavior should be reproducible from the manifest.

evaluation._note: Changed: reserve evaluation inputs, metrics, and output locations. Why: validation should be configured without editing the training script.

calibration._note: Changed: reserve calibration configuration. Why: post-training thresholds and calibration artifacts should be documented with the run.

checkpointing._note: Changed: reserve checkpoint save and resume behavior. Why: checkpoint retention should be explicit for repeatable training runs.

server_sync._note: Changed: reserve server sync handles. Why: remote artifact movement should use SSH aliases and paths without embedding auth material.

safety_gates._note: Changed: reserve pre-run validation gates. Why: unsafe or incomplete training runs should be blocked before execution.
